raw_response:
{
  "communicative_function": "self-affirmation and declarative commitment to revised relational boundaries",
  "implicit_claims": [
    "prior relational patterns involved collapse, overgiving, and lack of mutuality",
    "the speaker possesses the capacity to enact these new behaviors consistently",
    "co-regulation in truth is a distinct, superior alternative to safety-seeking overgiving",
    "others are capable of meeting the speaker as they are when invited"
  ],
  "coherence_assessment": "thematically consistent; each clause reinforces a shift from self-erasing to reciprocal relating without internal contradiction",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "the speaker is engaged in observable behavioral change and the statement functions as an internal reminder rather than external performance",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "the statement is presented as achieved fact rather than intention, or deployed to signal virtue without corresponding action"
}
